name: Butterscotch Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, melt butter or margarine over low heat.
2. Remove from heat; stir in brown sugar.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in vanilla.
5. Stir together flour and baking powder, and salt (1/4 tsp).
6. Add to brown sugar mixture with coconut and nuts; mix well.
7. Spread in greased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1-inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for about 25 minutes.
9. Cut into bars while warm; remove from pan when cool.
Makes 36 bars.
